remarks: Penthouse Unit. Primary Bedroom windows face north and east, has Full Bath and Walk-in Closet. Second bedroom is across from the second full bath. Stainless Steel appliances, Washer/Dryer in unit. There are Hardwood Floors throughout. Garage parking with 2 reserved spaces. Building amenities are Secure Entrance, New Fitness Center, Outdoor Patio with Grills and Tables.  Superintendent on site. Close to Downtown Stamford Train station. $200 refundable deposit when reserving move in and out with management company. No weekend moves, Mon - Fri 9 am - 5 pm. Excellent credit and references required  No pets, please don't ask.
